Announcements

Applications For 2025 Project Period Erasmus+ Exchange Programme For Studies And Traineeships

27 Mart 2026

Applications For 2025 Project Period Erasmus+ Exchange Programme For Studies And Traineeships

Applications under the Erasmus+

2025 Project

Period

for our students who wish to receive education at the agreement universities abroad within the framework of the Erasmus+ Exchange Programme or do a traineeship in the programme countries

for the 2026-2027 academic year

will be accepted

27.03.2026 and 13.04.2026 (Until 4:00 PM)

from

https://turnaportal.ua.gov.tr/giris

link.

Points to Take Into Account During Application;

Please be sure to read the entire application guide  carefully before submitting your application. all documents (Transcript, Student Enrollment Paper, Language Certificate etc.), which will be uploaded to the application system, must be in “Pdf” format, except your photograph.

The mobility to be carried out within the scope of this announcement (including learning and internship) is limited to the duration of the project numbered

2025

, and the project deadline is

31.07.2027

. Students who apply for both internship and learning mobility at the same time must fill out the priority petition below.

Please click for the Erasmus+ Learning Mobility Announcement.

Please click for the Erasmus+ Internship Mobility Announcement.

P

lease click for the priority petition

.

Please click here for the list of Erasmus+ Bilateral Agreements.

Please click here for the list of the list of Erasmus+ Departmental Coordinators.

Please click

here for the Erasmus Individual Application Screens User Guide.

You may contact us via

erasmus@galata.edu.tr

email address for any questions concerning applications.

DİĞER DUYURULAR
